description:
## [1.0.6](https://github.com/Lynx6319/patch-youtube-scroll-block/compare/v1.0.5...v1.0.6) (2026-05-05)


### Bug Fixes

* escape double quotes in .releaserc prepareCmd jq filter ([c925e5b](https://github.com/Lynx6319/patch-youtube-scroll-block/commit/c925e5bed06730c7fbf53fb3b12a0667688f611b))
* relax ShortsSwipeFingerprint to remove version-sensitive instruction filters ([daf465a](https://github.com/Lynx6319/patch-youtube-scroll-block/commit/daf465a05158eb32accf9db6a6c950dae2b80d63))
* set signature_download_url to null and persist it across releases ([0eba103](https://github.com/Lynx6319/patch-youtube-scroll-block/commit/0eba1030fc8296135a999202acf53fe24d024fab))
